results.Description: THE CONTRACTOR SHALL SUPPORT THE DARPA SEA TRAIN PHASE 1 AND 2 PROGRAM, WHICH WILL DEVELOP AND DEMONSTRATE APPROACHES TO OVERCOME THE RANGE LIMITATIONS INHERENT IN MEDIUM UNMANNED SURFACE VESSELS BY EXPLOITING WAVE MAKING RESISTANCE REDUCTIONS.
